title: Tensile Test (Simplified Input)
description: A user-friendly form to describe a uniaxial tensile test and its results. Fill in the specimen IRI, test conditions, and the measured mechanical properties. This input will be automatically converted to a standardised RDF representation (TTO/PMDCo OO-LD).

test_name.title: Test Name
test_name.description: A human-readable name for this tensile test. Example: 'Tensile test 316L bar 1'.

test_id.title: Test ID
test_id.description: Optional. Identifier (IRI slug) for this test in the RDF graph. Auto-derived from test_name if omitted.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional free-text description of this test.

specimen_iri.title: Specimen IRI
specimen_iri.description: The IRI of the specimen being tested. This must reference an existing node in the knowledge graph (e.g. one registered with the specimen/PMDCo schema).

test_standard.title: Test Standard
test_standard.description: The standard or norm followed (e.g. 'ISO 6892-1', 'ASTM E8').

strain_rate.title: Strain Rate
strain_rate.description: Crosshead displacement rate or strain rate during the test.

strain_rate_unit.title: Strain Rate Unit
strain_rate_unit.description: Unit for the strain rate value.

temperature.title: Test Temperature
temperature.description: Temperature at which the test was conducted, in °C.

results.title: Measured Properties
results.description: Mechanical properties determined from the test. Add one entry per property.

value.title: Value
value.description: Numeric value of the measured property.

unit.title: Unit
unit.description: Unit of the value: 'MPa' or 'GPa' for stress properties, '%' for elongation and reduction of area.
